zh.Zevenbergen, North Brabant, Netherlands: 荷蘭努-布拉班特斯文爾根
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth van Arkel於大約1220年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德阿可爾時，她的父親Herbaren II van Arkel17歲，母親Aleidis van Heusden31歲。她於大約1260年與Willem II van Strijen結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1263年在荷蘭努-布拉班特斯文爾根享年45歲。

zh-hans.Zevenbergen, North Brabant, Netherlands: 荷兰努-布拉班特斯文爾根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth van Arkel于大约1220年出生在荷兰-拉藍德阿可爾时，她的父亲Herbaren II van Arkel17岁，母亲Aleidis van Heusden31岁。她于大约1260年与Willem II van Strijen结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1263年在荷兰努-布拉班特斯文爾根享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Arkel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton: from the Old Breton personal name Arthmael, composed of the elements arth ‘bear’ (in a transferred sense ‘soldier’) + mael ‘prince’, Latinized as Armagilus. This was the name of a Christian saint (5th century) who was the subject of a local cult in Brittany.
Jewish (from Ukraine): artificial name from Yiddish dialect (h)arml ‘hermine’.

variants.name: Ermel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Jurgen, Markus, Matthias.

German: from Middle High German ermel ‘sleeve’, a metonymic occupational name for a sleeve maker. Alternatively, it may have been a nickname for someone who wore clothing with conspicuous sleeves; in medieval times the size of sleeves was regulated by luxury laws.
German: from a pet form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names formed with Erm, from erm, irm ‘all-encompassing, great’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace). Compare Armel 1.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth van Arkel was born about 1220, in Arkel, South Holland, Netherlands, her father, Herbaren II van Arkel, was 17 and her mother, Aleidis van Heusden, was 31. She married Willem II van Strijen about 1260. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1263, in Zevenbergen, North Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth van Arkel est née environ 1220, à Arkel, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Herbaren II van Arkel, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Aleidis van Heusden, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Willem II van Strijen environ 1260. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1263, à Zevenbergen, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth van Arkel um 1220 in Arkel, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Herbaren II van Arkel 17 und ihre Mutter Aleidis van Heusden 31. Sie hat um 1260 Willem II van Strijen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1263 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Zevenbergen, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth van Arkel è nata il circa 1220 nel Arkel, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Herbaren II van Arkel, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Aleidis van Heusden, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Willem II van Strijen circa 1260. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1263, nel Zevenbergen, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.Strijen, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドストリジェン

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth van Arkelが約1220年にオランダズイド-hオランドアルケルで生まれた時，父Herbaren II van Arkelは17歳，母Aleidis van Heusdenは31歳であった。約1260年にWillem II van Strijenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1263年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントゼベンバージェンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth van Arkel(이)가 대략 1220년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 아클에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Herbaren II van Arkel(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aleidis van Heusden(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1260년 Willem II van Strijen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1263년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 즈에븐버겐에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.abt 1220–ABT 1263: tany ho any amin'ny 1220–tany ho any amin'ny 1263

pt.Zevenbergen, North Brabant, Netherlands: Zevenbergen, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth van Arkel nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Arkel, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Herbaren II van Arkel, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Aleidis van Heusden, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Willem II van Strijen aproximadamente 1260. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1263, em Zevenbergen, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth van Arkel родилась около 1220 г. в местности аркел, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Herbaren II van Arkel было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Aleidis van Heusden, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Willem II van Strijen около 1260 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1263 г. в местности зивенбиржен, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 45 лет.

sm.abt 1220–ABT 1263: e tusa o le 1220–e tusa o le 1263

Se casó con Willem II van Strijen aproximadamente 1260. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1263, en Zevenbergen, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, a la edad de 45 años.
